title: Stacked Line Chart
excerpt: I’m not quite understanding how the Stacked Line Chart is counting items. For example if I hover over a point and it says a total of 1 which is correct but the Y-Axis is on the line that says 9. I have the X-Axis referen…

posts.author: pjimenez (Pedro Jimenez)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m not quite understanding how the Stacked Line Chart is counting items. For example if I hover over a point and it says a total of 1 which is correct but the Y-Axis is on the line that says 9. I have the X-Axis referencing a label of Fiscal Year and the Stack is looking at deliverable type.

Stacked Line Chart3779×1950 362 KB

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@pjimenez yeah, that chart mismatch happens a lot - the Y-axis scaling in Monday dashboards isn’t super consistent when some series have missing data.

If you want cleaner trend lines or % breakdowns per deliverable type, try Time in Status for monday.com . It gives you verified time and count reports across projects and timelines - way more reliable than fiddling with dashboard math.

You can also check out the full list of report types here: Time in Status Report Types - they cover time in status, time by user, time per item, and more for deeper insights.
